title: paeonia feminea var. humilis
intro: Paeonia feminea var. humilis, also known as the Himalayan peony, is a perennial plant species within the peony family native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory qualities, which have been used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Paeonia feminea var. humilis include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its potential to help manage stress and promote relaxation. Paeonia feminea var. humilis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, with the dried roots and rhizomes commonly used in traditional medicine.
